caption: A man wearing a grey, upright wig, glasses, and black headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. In front of him is a black microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and clothing items on hangers, including a yellow shirt with "LEE" written on it. A red and white logo with the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is overlaid on the left and right sides of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, but his facial expression shifts slightly; he appears to be speaking in the early frames and then closes his mouth, looking slightly downward toward the end. The camera angle and background remain static throughout the clip.
